_meta.description: Beyond Paradise source tier registry. Every claim in facts.json must reference a source from this registry. Tier 1 = highest trust. Tier 6 = firsthand (Tim/Kim).

1.label: Official / Scientific authority
1.description: Government bodies, IUCN, peer-reviewed journals, official park authorities. Highest trust — cite directly.
examples: Marine Parks and Reserves Unit Tanzania
peer-reviewed journals (PLOS ONE, Marine Mammal Science, Oryx)

2.label: Established research institutions
2.description: NGOs with peer-reviewed research output, citizen-science databases with methodology, conservation programme reports.

3.label: Reputable reference organisations
3.description: Industry bodies, national tourism authorities, established conservation trusts. Use with secondary corroboration.

4.label: Established travel / industry sources
4.description: Reputable travel publishers, established tour operators with documented methodology. Use only for logistics (prices, transfers, distances) not wildlife claims.

5.label: Operator communications
5.description: Individual lodge or operator data. Treat as single source only — must have Tier 1–3 corroboration for any factual claim.

6.label: Tim / Kim firsthand
6.description: Tim Hennig or Kim direct observation during a paid visit. Highest value for subjective experience, lodge character, encounter quality. Must include date and location.
examples: Tim Hennig, on-site observation, Singita Grumeti, November 2025
Kim, first-hand visit, Four Seasons Nam Hai, March 2026

iucn-redlist.name: IUCN Red List of Threatened Species
iucn-redlist.notes: Authoritative for species conservation status, range maps, population trends

mpru-tanzania.name: Marine Parks and Reserves Unit, Tanzania
mpru-tanzania.notes: Authority for whale shark interaction permits, Mafia Marine Park, Mnemba Atoll

marine-megafauna-foundation.name: Marine Megafauna Foundation
marine-megafauna-foundation.notes: Lead researcher for whale shark ecology in Tanzania/Mozambique. Citizen science via sharkbook.ai

sharkbook.name: Wildbook for Whale Sharks (sharkbook.ai)
sharkbook.notes: Photo-identification database of individual whale sharks globally. ~180–200 Tanzania individuals catalogued

cordio-ea.name: CORDIO East Africa — Coral Reef Degradation in the Indian Ocean
cordio-ea.notes: Peer-reviewed coral health assessments for Pemba, Zanzibar, Mafia reefs

frankfurt-zoological-society.name: Frankfurt Zoological Society (FZS) — Serengeti
frankfurt-zoological-society.notes: Lead scientific partner for Serengeti ecosystem since 1950s. Migration ecology data

amir-2016-plos-one.name: Amir OA et al. (2016) — Tourism impact on Indo-Pacific bottlenose dolphins, PLOS ONE
amir-2016-plos-one.notes: Definitive study on dolphin tourism impact in Menai Bay, Zanzibar

mbca.name: Menai Bay Conservation Area
mbca.notes: Official management authority for Menai Bay. Boat registration and tourism guidelines

thanda-island.name: Thanda Island — Conservation Programme
thanda-island.notes: Active turtle nest protection programme. Reports from 2017 (first hatchlings) to present

singita.name: Singita — Official communications and conservation reports

tim-firsthand.name: Tim Hennig — First-hand observation
tim-firsthand.notes: Tim Hennig, GM Hotel Matlai Zanzibar. 5+ years East Africa. All lodge reviews from paid stays.

kim-firsthand.name: Kim — First-hand observation
kim-firsthand.notes: Kim, Vietnamese, Beyond Paradise Asia correspondent. First-hand knowledge of Vietnam luxury travel.

avoid_list.reason: User-generated reviews, unverifiable claims, commercial bias in rankings
Commercial platform — price data OK with date citation, wildlife/experience claims unreliable
Commercial aggregator with operator-supplied content — conflict of interest for ethics grading
Marketing content — PADI's research publications acceptable, blog posts are not
